author: samquill
title: do_run_batches uses 15 raw callback parameters instead of a Deps dataclass
notes: Duplicate of S023 (@jasonsutter87), which was submitted ~1 hour earlier and verified YES_WITH_CAVEATS. Both target the same function (do_run_batches at execution.py:391), the same issue (excessive _fn callback parameters), and the same call site (orchestrator.py:228-284). S030 slightly miscounts callbacks (says 15, actually 16). The observation about existing CodexBatchRunnerDeps/FollowupScanDeps is a nice detail but does not make the submission original.
